tasks.label: ✅ Verify
tasks.detail: Validates flake syntax and evaluates modules
tasks.command: mkdir -p logs && script -qec 'nix flake check --show-trace' logs/verify-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).log

tasks.label: 🧑‍🔬 Test All
tasks.detail: Runs flake check + system eval + home-manager eval
tasks.command: mkdir -p logs && script -qec 'echo "=== Flake Check ===" && nix flake check --show-trace && echo && echo "=== Eval System ===" && nix eval .#nixosConfigurations.2600AD.config.system.build.toplevel.drvPath --show-trace && echo && echo "=== Eval Home Manager ===" && nix eval .#nixosConfigurations.2600AD.config.home-manager.users.bittermang.home.packages --show-trace && echo "✓ All validations passed"' logs/test-all-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).log

tasks.label: 🛠️ Build
tasks.detail: Builds system closure without activating (dry-run validation)

tasks.label: ⚡ Switch
tasks.detail: Rebuild and activate the current configuration
tasks.command: mkdir -p logs && script -qec 'sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake .#2600AD --show-trace' logs/switch-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).log

tasks.label: 🔄 Update
tasks.detail: Update all flake inputs (nixpkgs, home-manager, agenix)

tasks.label: 🔑 Secrets
tasks.detail: Show encryption status of all .age secret files
tasks.command: echo '════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  HALLway Secrets Status' && echo '════════════════════════════════════' && for host in 2600AD HALLpass.space; do echo '' && echo "  ▸ $host"; for f in hosts/$host/secrets/*.age; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; if head -1 "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^age-encryption'; then echo "    ✓  $(basename $f)"; else echo "    ✗  $(basename $f)  ← run: agenix -e $f"; fi; done; done && echo '' && echo '════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  See docs/secrets.md for full workflow'

tasks.label: 🖴 Disk Space
tasks.detail: Shows ZFS pool, Nix store, and memory status
tasks.command: echo '=== ZFS Pool ===' && sudo zpool list && echo '' && echo '=== Disk Usage ===' && df -h / /home /nix && echo '' && echo '=== Nix Store ===' && du -sh /nix/store && echo '' && echo '=== Memory ===' && free -h

tasks.label: 🗑️ GC
tasks.detail: Garbage collect old generations and unused store paths
tasks.command: sudo nix-collect-garbage -d && nix-collect-garbage -d && echo '' && echo '=== Store Size ===' && du -sh /nix/store

tasks.label: 🗑️ Clean
tasks.command: rm -rf result result-* logs && echo '✓ Cleaned results and logs'
